programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen tries to help caffeine-addicted Jack kick the habit, but ends up fighting cravings of her own. Will is annoyed that Grace appears to be acting more like a wife than an old friend during Joe and Larry's civil partnership ceremony

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: The pair pose as house-hunters to enable them to snoop around actress Sandra Bernhard's home, but their scheme backfires when she accepts their offer for the property. Karen is chastised for turning up late to her stepson's swimming gala. Comedy, with Eric McCormack and Debra Messing

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will tries to impress Matt with his athletic prowess, but ends up having to take Grace's advice on how to improve his baseball skills. Karen decides Jack's apartment needs redecorating in an exotic style. Patrick Dempsey guest stars

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael feels neglected because Jay is spending all of her time studying for her psychology exam. Comedy, starring Damon Wayans

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Jay asks Michael for a present on Sweetheart's Day, but he decides to base the price of the gift on her attitude toward him

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A dispute with the residents of a mobile home leads to a man being attacked with a hammer, and a woman decides to tackle a dog mess problem in the communal area of her council block. The programme also follows the attempts of a couple to find evidence that their neighbour is subjecting them to a psychological campaign of terror

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Steve and David were once good friends, but are now embroiled in an ongoing dispute that started with a simple off-the-cuff remark and soon spiralled into an all-out war over the ownership of a hedge. Also featured is a man who sent some workmates round to the house of a former mayor to collect money for unpaid building work, but ended up on the wrong side of the law himself when she complained to the police about his behaviour

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Experienced enforcement agent Stewart and trainee Iain head to Blackpool to chase down a builder owing nearly £3,500 to an unhappy customer, while father and son Del and Dael are in Essex to collect over £2,500 owed to a frozen food company. In south London, Del and Brian attempt to recover nearly £10,000 from a debtor who acted as guarantor for a friend's rental agreement, ending in a bizarre stand-off with the debtor's daughter

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben try to drill through the locks on a property to evict the residents, only to find to their surprise that the door has been modified with special reinforced metal. Elsewhere, Delroy and Brian try to reclaim money a garage owes to a customer and are shocked by the condition of the vehicle in question, and a woman who has acted as guarantor for her sister's tenancy does not realise the extent of her responsibilities

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement agents evict a large group of squatters barricaded into a disused nursery in London, and have to resort to smashing their way in as they refuse to leave. Meanwhile, agents in Bristol try to recover over £10,000 owed by a plumbing business to a supplier, and emotions run high when they attempt to evict a tenant who pleads her innocence in West London

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: An episode combining new and unforgettable past cases. The High Court Enforcement Agents head to Manchester to track down over £5,000-worth of debt, and seize an expensive car in the process. Later in south London, the agents deal with a violent debtor who threatens them with a concealed weapon, and in Liverpool, they are met with lies and aggression from a mechanic who owes nearly £3,000

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: AJ and Richie are in pursuit of a van speeding through narrow country lanes, while Jacko and the team box in a van carrying large quantities of cannabis. Plus, sparks fly when dog handler Justin and police dog Elsa capture two burglars on a building site

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Chris Spencer and the team chase a Golf GTI racing through the streets at three times the speed limit, while reports of gunshots at a house party on a residential street lead to a full-scale firearms operation

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Brent storms off and Emmett is devastated, Aaron and David are in for a rude awakening, and Jane takes on more than she bargained for helping Susan out at school

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ziggy tries to get the lowdown on Dean and Amber's mutual history, and with Marilyn and John out of options, the sparky newcomer un-fires herself

programme.title: Diet Secrets & How to Lose Weight
programme.desc: A team of scientists, doctors and dieticians reveal the benefits of superfoods, nutrient-rich stars of the culinary world that are said to have all sorts of weight loss and health-giving properties. Plus, Bianca Gascoigne swaps chardonnay for chia seeds to see what effect they have on her health

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Two more families swap places for a week, getting a taste of one another's lives in rural Essex and inner-city London. The Heasemans live in a luxurious farmhouse with six acres of land, while the Webbs rent a maisonette in a tower block that is so small, eldest son Marcus is confined to the sofa in the living room. How will both families find their new living arrangements - and the accompanying budgets?

programme.title: Plastic Surgery Knifemares
programme.desc: The secrets behind dermal lip fillers, investigating how social media and celebs have driven a massive boom in the industry, and looking at just how wrong things can go

programme.title: Outbreak (1995)
programme.desc: An expert in infectious diseases races against time to find a cure for a rapidly fatal airborne virus which is wiping out the population of a small town, and is threatening to turn into a pandemic. However, his task is hampered by senior military men, who are bent on burning down the town and incinerating the virus with it, regardless of any casualties. Thriller, with Dustin Hoffman, Rene Russo, Morgan Freeman, Kevin Spacey and Donald Sutherland

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.desc: Documentary following the stories of four women who were sexually exploited by men, including model Chloe Ayling, who was kidnapped while working in Italy

programme.title: Rich Kids, Skint Holiday
programme.desc: Privileged 19-year-old Harry has no experience with children, but manages to build a bond with eight-year-old Connor and the Clifford family on a caravan park in the New Forest. Mum Kate challenges Harry to plan a day's activities for £20

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Encouraged by Jack to break out of their domestic laziness, the duo decide take a bread-making course. The teacher apparently believes that making loaves and making love are the same thing, giving both flatmates his number. Soon the seductive chef is carrying on affairs with both Will and Grace under the same roof - though neither is any the wiser of the other's interest. Meanwhile, Jack and Karen pick up an earworm - an infuriatingly catchy jingle from a commercial. Nick Offerman - Megan Mullally's real-life husband - guest stars, with regulars Mullally, Eric McCormack and Debra Messing

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When Joe and Larry get broody, Grace offers Larry a job at their design studio to distract him. Once he is there, however, she finds that Larry is just as annoying at work as he is at home - especially because he insists on agreeing with everything Will says. Meanwhile, in his latest attempt to find a career, Jack takes a job as a Lyft driver. However, on his first run, he knocks over unhinged neighbour Val in the road. Eric McCormack and Debra Messing star

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan dates a new girlfriend who fulfils his every sexual fantasy. At first Charlie is happy for his brother - until he finds himself forced to take responsibility for looking after a neglected Jake, and resolves to end the relationship any way he can

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Part one of two. American sitcom, guest starring Sydney Pollack, with Eric McCormack and Debra Messing

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael makes the unwise decision to take a vow of silence while away on a meditation weekend with Jay

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Part one of two. The Kyles go to the Bahamas on holiday, and as soon as they arrive Michael announces he wants to have a relaxing, peaceful time

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Another selection of neighbourly conflicts, featuring a dispute between two retired men about a new driveway, which resulted in the pair fighting in the street in the Tayside town of Kinross. The Webbs' peace in rural Plymouth was shattered when a new family moved in a few doors away, and a row about parking erupted into a full-blown punch-up. Meanwhile, Rita Grootendorst claims to have been the victim of a land grab by her next-door neighbours, although she is the one who has been arrested for assault and criminal damage over a drainpipe

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Wiltshire couple Edward Lea and his wife found their happy retirement was short-lived when an imposing 8ft breeze-block wall - dubbed the Great Wall of China - was built by their neighbour between their properties. In Scotland, Karen Ryrie and her elderly mother are fed up with living opposite John Tyer, his three dogs and a huge family of rabbits. Following their complaint about the smell, Karen's subsequent accusation of assault has made the dispute far more serious. Elsewhere, Linda Bird had not been expecting to wear headphones around the house when she moved to Bedfordshire for a quiet life, but the issue has escalated beyond excessive noise to become a battle over boundaries with neighbour Stanislav Fajdel

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: An episode combining new and unforgettable past cases. The High Court Enforcement Agents head to Manchester to track down over £5,000-worth of debt, and seize an expensive car in the process. Later in south London, the agents deal with a violent debtor who threatens them with a concealed weapon, and in Liverpool, they are met with lies and aggression from a mechanic who owes nearly £3,000

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Vic become party to a fractured family's school fee woes in Staffordshire and Del and Dael need to reclaim £3,500 after a rental van was returned badly damaged. Stewart and Elmor are in Warwickshire, where the members of a household blame their predicament on a scheming landlord whose subsequent arrival sparks a fierce reaction, while Iain helps Stewart remove a young mother from her Lancashire home

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The agents chase almost £3,000 owed by Indian takeaway owners, but when the staff deny any knowledge of the debt, the agents threaten to seize kitchen equipment. In east London they face a race against time to recover more than £8,000 from an electrical services company, and in Cheshire the enforcement agents chase nearly £4,000 of debt owed by a mobile phone shop

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The enforcement officers visit a former professional footballer who owes £4,500 in unpaid legal fees, and in London the officers chase up a £4,000 debt owed by a car dealer. Agents Gary Brown and Cona Jackson are involved in a serious altercation with a young man who owes almost £11,000, who threatens the officers with a knife when they start listing goods to seize to offset the debt

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Specially trained officers try to stop a 4x4 as it is driven dangerously through the streets of Basildon, and pursue a fake ambulance. In the air above Essex, the police helicopter trails a pair of teenage car thieves

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Bob and BoBo are in pursuit of a clapped-out white van through the back streets, where a dead end brings the vehicle to an abrupt halt and the occupants make off on foot. Martin clocks a driver speeding at more than 100mph, while Kev and rookie Oliver expose a cunning insurance scam

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Nurse Nicolette is keen to help Chloe prepare for her mum's arrival, Mackenzie wants to make her and Harlow's voice heard, but their hopes are dashed again, this time by Susan

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Willow feels Amber's wrath, reigniting her worries about Jasmine. John relents and decides to keep Amber on, prompting her to reach out to Willow

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Claire and Simon seek eviction specialist Chris's help to evict a man claiming to be renting their old family home. Meanwhile, Hamza hopes to get his council flat back after he tried to help a neighbour's friend by letting them stay for a week, but ended up being shut out when they refused to leave. Plus, a man is almost £30,000 in debt and in danger of repossession after his tenants stopped paying the rent

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The De Ropers' hopes of a peaceful life in Yeovil, Somerset, were rudely shattered by their neighbour Peter Stoodley's 120 noisy chickens, and they spent their first two years in their new home battling to persuade the authorities to ban him from keeping animals. In a quiet Anglesey village, 67-year-old Pamela Booth's discovered that her neighbour had been fraudulently using her bank card to steal more than £1,000 over 10 months, while a 24-year-old wannabe rapper in Dagenham, east London, generated more than 80 complaints after repeatedly keeping residents awake by playing loud music into the early hours in his flat

programme.title: The Last Samurai (2003)
programme.desc: The emperor of Japan recruits an American Civil War veteran to train his troops in a bid to wipe out a rebel faction of samurai warriors. The soldier is taken captive when the imperial army is defeated, and comes to respect his enemies' traditions and code of honour, finally going over to their side. Historical adventure, starring Tom Cruise, Ken Watanabe, Timothy Spall, Billy Connolly and Shichinosuke Nakamura

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A riot at an immigration rally in Central Park ends in murder, and the political climate forces McCoy to assign a special prosecutor, who starts to increase tensions in the office with his anti-establishment attitude. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An old acquaintance of Logan's is found dead, and is presumed to have committed suidice until the investigation reveals he was recently in contact with a former priest accused of sex crimes

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A taxi-driver is found dead in his car, and Logan follows a chain of evidence involving a loan shark, a forged cheque and a missing plumber that leads him to believe the victim's wife is the killer. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A woman is buried alive, but manages to claw her way out of the grave. The only thing she remembers is that someone has planted a bomb on board a Navy ship - but in the process of trying to learn her identity, the team discovers things are not as they seem. Sherilyn Fenn (Twin Peaks) guest stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A spy satellite technician's voyeuristic activities inadvertently lead to him witnessing the murder of a Navy commander involved in an important weapons project. Tipped off by an anonymous call, the investigators arrive at the base to find the victim has been stabbed in the back. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sasha Alexander

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team races to find a sniper who is targeting marine recruitment officers and picking them off one by one. The only clue is a white feather left at the scene of each shooting - and in the absence of any other evidence, Gibbs uses himself as bait to catch the killer. American drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Sasha Alexander and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Three similar execution-style killings take place, and the team discovers one of the victims was going through a messy divorce. His widow falls under suspicion of committing the first two crimes to mask the murder of her husband - but, unfortunately for the agents, she has an alibi. Starring Michael Weatherly and David McCallum

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson crosses paths with Alexandra Cabot while searching for an abducted mother and daughter. Stone is forced to make a tough decision on behalf of his sister

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler are faced with the gruesome task of identifying an animal rights activist found decapitated in a park during a romantic rendezvous. The team try to find two potential killers who were in the vicinity - but are later stunned to discover the crime scene was staged to mislead investigators. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Fin investigate the case of a woman found raped and murdered underneath a flyover - and discover $1million of a new cancer drug in the boot of her car. Analysis reveals the dead woman's supplies were fake, linking her to a pharmaceutical racket - but another assault gives the detectives a more immediate concern. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Ice-T

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man accused of the sexual abuse of his daughter is subsequently murdered, but laying the blame at the door of the chief suspects proves difficult. Several family members are in the frame, but despite evidence of a gun outside the victim's office, they appear to be innocent

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates the ritualistic murder of a boy, a woman and an elderly man, and finds they all figured in sexual abuse cases investigated by Benson. As more dead bodies turn up, it becomes clear the detective is the killer's next target - but the others find themselves unable to prove anything against the most likely suspect

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives corner a mass murderer who has escaped from prison, but he takes a room full of school children hostage and opens fire. Once in custody, the criminal refuses to accept a deal, and McCoy worries he will try to break free again - until the father of one victim takes matters into his own hands

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An actress is found hanged in her New York apartment, but with her career on the rise and a loving husband supporting her, Green and Cassady are determined to prove the death was not the suicide it appears to be. Crime drama, starring Jesse L Martin and Milena Govich

programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.desc: A gay city councillor is shot dead after a meeting, and the trail of suspicion leads the team to a bigoted rival politician and a male prostitute. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.desc: As Toronto swelters through a heat wave, small-town deputy Eddie Conroy comes to town needing Angie and Shade's help when the suspicious death of his friend is ruled a suicide

Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, BD Wong and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: While staying in an opulent hotel, courtesy of Grady's fraternity brother Gary, Jessica becomes embroiled in a fight to clear Grady of a woman's murder, which is tied to Gary's past

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is invited to witness the reappearance of a mysterious comet, but instead finds herself conducting another murder investigation. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A famous, but ailing, playwright tempts fate by proposing to Jessica - and almost immediately finds himself charged with murdering his business manager. Starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman's 75th birthday party is interrupted by a sudden death, presenting Jessica with yet another baffling mystery to solve. Starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates a mysterious death, the repercussions of which are causing unrest among the riders at a rodeo. Starring Angela Lansbury, Kristy McNichol and Larry Wilcox

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

Angela Lansbury stars, with Dean Stockwell and Eugene Roche

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica agrees to help a friend with a political campaign to become a senatorial candidate. When the publicity manager is murdered, she finds herself caught up in an intriguing murder investigation. Angela Lansbury stars as the amateur sleuth

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica unwittingly gets involved in a contract killing, leading her to be accused of being the assassin and jailed. The incarcerated detective must rely on Grady and Michael to prove her innocence. With guest stars John Rhys-Davies and Michael Horton

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the rape of a cellist, and initially believe her conductor is to blame for the attack - especially given his penchant for erotic film-making. However, they soon discover an obsessive stalker is watching her from afar - and will stop at nothing to continue his monitoring. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Cabot takes a child abuse case, determined to find evidence that will convict the defendant. Her personal feelings tempt her to bend the rules, leading Stabler and Benson into an illegal search of the victim's home - a move that threatens all of their careers

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A urologist is murdered, and his wife claims she was raped and robbed by the killer. Stabler and Benson suspect the doctor's mistress of being involved - until she too is sexually assaulted, and details of another relationship emerge, shedding light on the culprit's identity. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and another officer team up to track down a serial killer, focusing their investigation on a recently released sex offender - but fresh evidence leads them to believe he may have been wrongly convicted. Concerned that a miscarriage of justice could have occurred, they look over old case files and turn their attention to the suspect's neighbour, a man with employment links in the vicinity of seven murders around the country. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and David Keith

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy and Nick continue to work undercover infiltrating a meth pipeline, but their covert mission goes sideways when both disappear. Meanwhile, a random arrest at 15 Division puts Sam Swarek and the other officers in the middle of the drug investigation-turned-rescue operation. Andy must figure out how to cope with the transformation of her own life as well as those of her friends at the station and continue to do the job she loves. Starring Missy Peregrym

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy has to come to terms with her past when she is forced to work on a bank robbery case with the newly promoted Swarek on her first day back at 15 Division. The investigation leads them to a violent ex-convict determined to get his old life back at any cost. Meanwhile, a distraught woman offers Nick some perspective on his life with Gail, and Frank has a big surprise for Noelle

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.title: Modern Times
programme.desc: Documentary about the characters who live and work in the area of central London, which is famous for being the most coveted square on the Monopoly board and is home to Claridge's hotel and Christie's auction house. The film reveals a world of surprises and deep contrasts, including an estate agent selling multimillion-pound mansions, cafe owners hanging on to their livelihoods by their fingernails, an NHS doctor whose patients range from billionaires to people on benefits, an upmarket resident who dresses in Victorian clothing and a cabbie living in social housing

programme.desc: Drama documentary examining the impact of climate change. In an environmentally devastated future, the last man alive looks back at footage from 2008 to uncover the reasons why the human race did so little to prevent climate change before it was too late, examining real life stories including a windfarm developer fighting public opposition and an elderly mountain guide who has witnessed the melting of Alpine glaciers first-hand

programme.title: Dead Ringers (1988)
programme.desc: Identical twin gynaecologists Elliot and Beverly share everything in their life. Elliot, self-assured and experienced, passes his unwitting sexual conquests to shy and sensitive Beverly when he tires of them. However, when Beverly falls in love for the first time with a patient, the affair drives the brothers apart - and both men begin to lose their grip on their sanity. David Cronenberg's psychological thriller, with Jeremy Irons in a dual role alongside Genevieve Bujold
